name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
description: Gemini 2.5 Flash is a large language model developed by Google. It is designed to provide fast and efficient performance for a wide range of natural language processing tasks. The model is trained on a diverse dataset and is capable of understanding and generating human-like text.

name: GPT-4o Mini
description: GPT-4o Mini is a compact version of OpenAI's GPT-4o model. It is optimized for performance and efficiency, making it suitable for applications that require quick responses and lower computational resources. Despite its smaller size, GPT-4o Mini retains much of the language understanding and generation capabilities of its larger counterpart.

name: Grok 4.1 Fast
description: Grok 4.1 Fast is a language model developed by X-AI, designed for high-speed processing and efficient performance. It is trained on a vast corpus of text data and is capable of handling a variety of natural language tasks, including text generation, summarization, and question-answering. The model's architecture is optimized for speed, making it ideal for applications that require real-time responses.

name: Mistral Large 2512
description: Mistral Large 2512 is a powerful language model developed by Mistral AI. It is designed to provide high-quality text generation and understanding capabilities. The model is trained on a large and diverse dataset, allowing it to perform well on a wide range of natural language processing tasks. Mistral Large 2512 is suitable for applications that require deep language comprehension and sophisticated text generation.
